modmenu.summaryTranslation.seamlesssleep: Never blink through the night again.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.seamlesss:
Rethinks the way players sleep:

§8-§r Smooth & Synced animation
§8-§r Visual improvements
§8-§r Minimal server impact

Now available for: §3§lForge§r, \u00A76\u00A7lNeoForge\u00A7r and §f§lFabric§r!
Discord: gabrielfl4
config.seamlesssleep.title: Seamless Sleep Settings
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_text_opa: Adjusts text transparency while you are in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_backgrou: Adjusts the dark background transparency while you are in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.overlay.enabled.des: Shows the "Sleeping through the night" message during the transition.
config.seamlesssleep.overlay.darkness.de: Controls how dark the screen gets (fade out) when closing eyes.
config.seamlesssleep.chat.dim_multiplier: General chat opacity when lying in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.chat.max_lines.desc:
Maximum chat lines visible while sleeping.

Use 0 to hide.
config.seamlesssleep.camera.tilt_degrees:
Camera tilt angle when lying down.

0 is the vanilla default.
config.seamlesssleep.misc.debug_logs.des: Shows Seamless Sleep technical logs in the console.
config.seamlesssleep.misc.replay_compati: Changes the mod base math to an §eexperimental§r one compatible with mods like ReplayMod and Flashback.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.clears_weathe:
Resets rain and thunder when the night passes.

§cREQUIRES: /sleep reload
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.duration_mult:
Multiplier that scales the time the sleep animation takes.

§cREQUIRES: /sleep reload
config.seamlesssleep.server_controlled:
§6Server Controlled

§r§o§7Can be tweaked via /sleep or by the host
command.seamlesssleep.reload.created: Config not found. Default created and loaded.
command.seamlesssleep.reload.error: Failed to read config. Defaults loaded.
command.seamlesssleep.reload.synced: All clients synchronized with the server.
